data.title: Robert Breedlove says 'Bitcoin is the fix' to central banking scam
data.description:

source: https://www.thestreet.com/crypto/markets/robert-breedlove-says-bitcoin-is-the-fix-to-central-banking-scam

data.title: David Sacks to attend Bitcoin 2025 conference, sharing the stage with Winklevoss brothers
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official news of the Bitcoin Conference, David Sacks, the White House's director of cryptocurrency and artificial intelligence, will attend the Bitcoin 2025 conference on May 27, and share his insights on Bitcoin and the crypto industry with the Winklevoss brothers, president and CEO of Gemini. The Bitcoin 2025 conference will be held from May 27 to 29 at the Venetian Conference Center in Las Vegas, USA.

data.title: Crypto Market Plunges as Trump Declares Trade War on EU
data.description:
TL;DR Donald Trump announced a 50% tariff on all imports from the European Union starting June 1, 2025, triggering an immediate drop in stock markets and cryptocurrency prices. The president also threatened Apple with a 25% tax if it does not move its production to the U. S. Amid the financial panic, cryptocurrencies are pulling back,. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/crypto-market-plunges-as-trump-declares-trade-war-on-eu/

data.title: U.S. Sovereign Wealth Fund Plans on Hold Amid Other Priorities
data.description: According to BlockBeats, U.S. Treasury Secretary Besent announced that plans for the sovereign wealth fund have been suspended until other matters are addressed. Earlier, on May 8, a White House spokesperson stated that under U.S. President Donald Trump's executive order, the Treasury and Commerce Departments had developed plans for the sovereign wealth fund, but no final decision has been made.

data.title: US Treasury Secretary Benson: Sovereign wealth fund plan has been suspended
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: US Treasury Secretary Bessant: The sovereign wealth fund plan has been suspended until we have dealt with all other matters. (Jinshi)

data.title: When Will Altcoin Season Begin After Bitcoin Price Hit ATH Above $111,000?
data.description:
Crypto analyst Astronomer has provided insights into when the altcoin season will likely begin following the Bitcoin price’s rally to a new all-time high (ATH). His analysis indicated that BTC’s dominance is about to top, which will pave the way for altcoins to outperform the flagship crypto. Altcoin Season To Begin Soon As Bitcoin Price Hits New ATH In an X post, Astronomer predicted that the altcoin season is imminent, seeing as BTC’s dominance (BTC. D) has hit 65% following the Bitcoin price rally to a new ATH
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/altcoin/when-altcoin-season-begins/

data.title: Stablecoin issuer Stablecorp completes $1.8 million in financing, with Coinbase Ventures and others participating
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Canadian stablecoin issuer Stablecorp has completed a $1.8 million financing, with investors including Coinbase Ventures and Side Door Ventures.
The funds will be used to expand the infrastructure construction of the Canadian dollar stablecoin QCAD, including the establishment of on-chain foreign exchange liquidity and payment channel integration. (Betakit)

data.title: Semler Scientific’s Bitcoin holdings surpass 4,000 BTC with latest purchase
data.description:
Nasdaq-listed Semler Scientific announced Friday a purchase of 455 BTC for $50 million, bringing its total holdings to 4,264 BTC.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/355583/semler-scientifics-bitcoin-holdings-surpass-4000-btc-with-latest-purchase?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: A whale liquidated TRUMP and FARTCOIN and made a profit of $200,000
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, two days ago, the whale "2WfeaM" spent $2 million to buy TRUMP, and spent another $2 million to buy FARTCOIN.
10 minutes ago, the whale sold all TRUMP and FARTCOIN, with a total profit of $200,000. Profit of $368,500 on FARTCOIN, but loss of $168,600 on TRUMP.

The digital currency has experienced a dramatic recovery, climbing an impressive 56% to [.

data.title: Alchemy acquires code-free NFT startup HeyMint, completing its second acquisition this month
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Alchemy announced the acquisition of HeyMint, a California-based NFT startup platform, for an undisclosed amount. The acquisition aims to enhance Alchemy's smart wallet infrastructure and simplify the user onboarding process for Web3 applications. Flor Ronsmans De Vry, co-founder and CTO of HeyMint, will join Alchemy.
HeyMint attracted more than 1 million users in its first two years of operation, facilitated $38 million in NFT sales, and supported Web3 projects for major brands such as The Sandbox, Universal Music Group, and Ubisoft. This acquisition is Alchemy's second deal this month, following its acquisition of Dexter Lab, a real-time data infrastructure provider for the Solana ecosystem. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Semler Scientific Boosts Bitcoin Holdings Following $114.8M Stock Offering
data.description:
TL;DR Semler Scientific bought 455 BTC with $114. 8 million from a stock offering and officially adopted Bitcoin as its primary treasury reserve asset. The healthcare firm reported a $64. 7 million net loss in Q1 and carries $41. 8 million in unrealized losses from previous BTC purchases. Natalie Brunell joined the board of directors and will lead. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/semler-scientific-boosts-bitcoin-holdings-following-114-8m-stock-offering/
